title: Access Control
summary: Restrict access to protected functionality and data.
remediationSummary: Add role-aware authorization checks and ensure protected operations require authenticated access.

title: Audit Logging
summary: Track security-relevant access and configuration changes.
remediationSummary: Capture auditable records for sensitive access, privileged operations, and configuration changes.

title: Consent Management
summary: Record and honor user consent requirements.
remediationSummary: Store consent decisions, expose user review paths, and block processing that lacks a valid consent basis.

title: Data Retention
summary: Apply retention and deletion rules to regulated data.
remediationSummary: Define retention windows, automate deletion workflows, and document retention policy enforcement.

title: Encryption at Rest
summary: Protect regulated data in persistent storage.
remediationSummary: Use managed encryption features or application-level encryption for regulated data stores and backups.

title: Incident Response
summary: Prepare escalation and breach handling workflows.
remediationSummary: Create documented response playbooks, escalation paths, and evidence collection procedures.

title: Security Testing
summary: Validate security posture through repeatable testing.
remediationSummary: Run repeatable security checks in CI and track remediation for detected weaknesses.
